arts.ttl: Should Wolves have reacted quicker to controversial Man City winner?
arts.sum: Watch Match of the Day 2 pundits Danny Murphy, Rafa Benitez and Theo Walcott question whether the Wolves players should have protested more quickly against John Stones' contested late winner for Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Carra: Title favourites Man City have vulnerability
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher believes Manchester City have the edge in the Premier League title race despite their vulnerability to counter-attacks.

arts.ttl: Premier League boss contacted by FA over Manchester City complaints
arts.sum: Gary O'Neil has been contacted by the FA after comments he made following Wolves' 2-1 defeat to Manchester City on Sunday

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso to Real Madrid or Man City? The state of play
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are preparing for Xabi Alonso's 2025 departure, according to German media. At least that is according to Sky Germany, which reports that Leverkusen bosses are preparing for life after Alonso.

arts.ttl: Manchester City make huge Pep Guardiola replacement decision that will leave Liverpool fuming
arts.sum: Latest Manchester City news with Xabi Alonso among the managerial targets to eventually replace Pep Guardiola

arts.ttl: Wolves boss Gary O'Neil asked by the FA to explain his claims Premier League referees may have an unconscious bias toward big clubs after controversial defeat by Man City
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: John Stones' header was awarded following a VAR pitchside review by referee Chris Kavanagh after it had initially been disallowed for offside.

arts.ttl: Wolves boss Gary O’Neil contacted by FA over comments after Manchester City loss
arts.sum: O’Neil suggested that Premier League referees may “subconsciously” show bias towards bigger clubs.
